title: echinaria capitata subsp. todaroana
intro: Echinaria capitata subsp. todaroana, also known as Echinacea, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Echinacea include reducing the severity and duration of colds and flu, as well as providing antioxidant and antiviral protection. Echinacea is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or supplement, and is commonly used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
